creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
* > This is, of course, because it is not in the packages/INDEX file (I

What are you talking about? :)

Anyway, I'll give you an INDEX file pretty soon.  It just takes so
damn long. ;)

Done.

Satoshi
